name: vibe-diagram
description: Generate self-contained HTML diagrams for architecture, workflows, debugging, technical design, decisions, and delivery acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Single-file HTML diagrams for technical communication
interface.longDescription: Use Vibe Diagram to turn architecture, workflow, sequence, state, debugging, design, decision, and delivery-acceptance work into readable self-contained HTML diagrams with evidence and validation context.
defaultPrompt: Create an HTML architecture diagram for this system.
Visualize this workflow as a single-file HTML diagram.
Turn this delivery summary into an acceptance diagram.
